---
title: 'Africa... Something is stirring...'
date: '2014-01-28T13:59:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6892883904731796181'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/africa-something-is-stirring.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

Africa<br />
<br />
Connections to Africa:<br />
&nbsp;- &nbsp;Deb Russel is a missionary to South Africa<br />
&nbsp;- <a href="http://pearsonsministries.com/about.html" target="_blank">Jeremy Pearsons</a> has ties to South Africa, and goes frequently.<br />
&nbsp;- Friends, like Chuck, that I work with from all over Africa; primarily Nigeria.<br />
<br />
Recently<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li>&nbsp;Contacted with&nbsp;<a href="http://churchfolknews.com/index.php?page=spotlight/spotlightDecember2010" target="_blank">Pastor Wycliffe Khaemba Wakhungu&nbsp;</a>out of Kenya and Uganda.&nbsp;Date: Sun, 19 Jan 2014 08:38:54 -0600.&nbsp;</li>
<li>&nbsp;Ben Bohn's dad, <a href="http://www.spiritafirefellowship.org/" target="_blank">Carl Bohn</a>, &nbsp;is a missionary to Uganda and Kenya met him the next day.</li>
<li>&nbsp;Jeff Goins is heading to Uganda and Kenya. Email.Post 1/26/2014&nbsp;</li>
<li>&nbsp;Met a lady on the phone today who is headed to South Africa. Told me about Marie Javins 1/27/2014 &nbsp;MariesWorldTour.com</li>
<li>...</li>
</ul>
<br />
